title: CS Modcraft
description: A collection of mods to have fun with in survival mode
body: This Modpack features several differrent mods aiming to improve the fantasy aspects ot the game and to make it feel more like a _fantasy game_. It does this by adding new content like new biomes and by _overhauling_ the already existing structures and adding several new ones to the game. Furthermore you can now choose from several _new classes added_ to the game by using the RPG-Series mods. For those not being into the fighting, i added a big load of mods to improve _building and exploration_. Last but not least, you can choose from a huge variety of different of dishes to keep you going, whatever you are doing. So, what are you waiting for? Download it now an write your part of history today!
